risk_note.tr: Geri alinabilir. Tam shutdown gerektigi durumlar (dual-boot, donanim degisikligi) icin kapatmak gerekir.
risk_note.en: Reversible. Should be off for true shutdown (dual-boot, hardware changes).

body.tr: Control Panel > Power Options > 'Choose what the power buttons do' > 'Change settings that are currently unavailable' > 'Turn on fast startup' kutusunu kaldir.
body.en: Control Panel > Power Options > 'Choose what the power buttons do' > 'Change settings that are currently unavailable' > uncheck 'Turn on fast startup'.

body.tr: Shutdown sonrasi onyukleme suresi 2-5 sn uzar ama tam kapanma yapildigindan dual-boot, BIOS update, donanim degisikligi guvenli olur.
body.en: Boot time after shutdown will be 2-5s longer, but true power-off means safe dual-boot, BIOS updates, hardware swaps.
